cta.label: Work Together
cta.title: Have a Project in Mind?
cta.description: Whether you need a backend API, an AI chatbot, or a full automation system, I would love to help you build it.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Backend Developer & Automation Engineer
About.p1: I am Barış Çilak, a backend developer and automation engineer based in Turkey. I specialize in building robust, intelligent software systems that automate complex business processes and integrate AI capabilities.
About.p2: My journey in software started with a fascination for how systems work under the hood. Over the years, this evolved into a specialization in backend engineering — designing APIs, data pipelines, automation workflows, and AI-powered applications.
About.p3: Today I work primarily with Python and FastAPI on the backend, integrating services like OpenAI, WhatsApp Business API, and various cloud platforms. I have delivered projects ranging from AI chatbots handling thousands of daily conversations to ETL pipelines processing millions of records.
About.p4: When I am not coding, I am writing technical articles about the things I have learned — both to share knowledge and to deepen my own understanding.
